[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

1 0110001010 4
2 1101010010 5
3 0000000000 a
4 1011100010 5
5 0110100001 4
6 1000000110 3
7 1011111001 7
